title: 20 Pcs Hose Clips, Adjustable 6-51mm Hose Clamps, 304 Stainless Steel Pipe Clamps, Jubileeclips Assorted Set for Garden, Pool, Pipe Tube, 6-12/13-19/16-25/21-38/27-51mm
features: 【Premium Material】These adjustable hose clamps are made of outstanding stainless steel material with smooth edges, which is rust and corrosion resistant, robust, not easy to break, and durable for long time use.
【Adjustable Design】The diameter range of stainless steel hose clamp is 6-51mm, flexible, easy to expand, and can easily use a screwdriver to loosen or tighten the belt for installation or removal.
【Prevent Leakage】The clamping force of hose clamp is strong, and the solid locking structure can lock the hose firmly without loosening and sliding, effectively preventing leakage.

【Wide Applications】These jubileeclips assorted set are suitable for connecting air hoses, water pipes, fuel pipes, cable pipes and silicone hoses, etc. Perfect for use in automotive, industry, shipping, sign, household etc.
【Package Includes】You will receive 4 pcs 6-12 mm, 4 pcs 13-19 mm, 4 pcs 16-25 mm, 4 pcs 21-38 mm, 4 pcs 27-51 mm, a total of 20 pcs hose clips, enough for your daily use.
description: Product Description Package includes: 4 × 6-12 mm 4 × 13-19 mm 4 × 16-25 mm 4 × 21-38 mm 4 × 27-51 mm Product information Product Name: Adjustable Hose Clamps Set Material: 304 Stainless Steel Size: 6-51mm Quantity: 20 Pcs
